# Milestone Issue Drafts

These issue drafts convert `PLAN.md` milestones into actionable GitHub issues.

How to use:
1. Open one draft file.
2. Copy the Title and Body into a new GitHub issue.
3. Apply the suggested labels.
4. Link related PRs and close the issue when all checklist items are done.

Suggested creation order:
1. `01-m1-foundation-hardening.md`
2. `02-m2-core-quality-and-tests.md`
3. `03-m3-notification-ux-improvements.md`
4. `04-m4-feature-completeness-task-management.md`
5. `05-m5-release-readiness.md`
